title: Palo Alto Networks - Prisma AIRS
description:
Prisma AIRS includes modules for AI Red Teaming, which runs automated attack simulations on AI agents, and Agent Artifact Scanning, which scans model artifacts and agent source code to find sources of risk. 

This includes the ability to run automated profiling, where AI Red Teaming gathers details about a target's tools, use case, and system prompts in order to tailor attack simulations to each target agent. Reports from AI Red Teaming automatically feed into runtime guardrails that the security architect can leverage.

risk_maps: OWASP Top 10 Risks and Mitigations for LLM Apps 2025

items: Map red scenarios to blue controls
Replay Red mutation through Bias filters
